questions: Should v1 placement support only a single selected timeline clip, or also batched outputs and multi-selection flows?
When inserting after the source clip, should downstream clips remain untouched or should insertion ripple later clips?
Should gallery-only selections be allowed to carry placement intent when they can be mapped back to a timeline clip?

success_criteria.criterion: Selected timeline media can be resolved to structured track and placement context without relying on prompt-text matching.
An edit request can persist an 'insert after this clip' action and execute it after async completion.
Image-to-image and magic-edit remain variants by default unless the user explicitly asks for a detached result.
Targeted tests covering selection resolution, placement-intent persistence, and completion-time insertion pass in the touched suites.
Anchor-relative placement survives clip movement, and deleted-anchor fallback behavior is explicit and test-covered.

assumptions: This restored plan represents the original deleted workstream and is reconstructed from surviving logs.
The first implementation targets tasks created from the editor-chat/timeline-agent flow, not every task producer in the app.
The default placement mode is non-ripple insertion on the same track at the anchor clip's end time for a single selected timeline clip.
structure_warnings: Restored from logs after the original plan directory was deleted.
